label: Timbre 1 OSC1 pad byte
notes: reserved per erl (osc1 trailing _:8) + edisyn (data[offset+11] = 0); preserve original value

label: Timbre 2 OSC1 pad byte
notes: reserved per erl (osc1 trailing _:8) + edisyn (data[offset+11] = 0) at timbre2 (49+108); preserve original value

label: Vocoder Ch1 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 84 per edisyn (KorgMicroKorgVocoder.java warns if data[+46] != data[+47]); Korg sysex doubles each channel level across 2 bytes. mirror byte 84 on write.

label: Vocoder Ch2 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 86. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch3 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 88. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch4 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 90. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch5 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 92. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch6 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 94. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch7 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 96. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch8 Level (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 98. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch1 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 100 per edisyn (warns if +62 != +63). mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch2 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 102. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch3 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 104. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch4 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 106. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch5 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 108. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch6 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 110. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch7 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 112. mirror on write.

label: Vocoder Ch8 Pan (paired high byte)
notes: vocoder mode only. paired-duplicate of byte 114. mirror on write.

label: Reserved tail byte 198
notes: reserved per erl + edisyn. In single/double mode this is inside timbre2 trailing pad. In vocoder mode this falls inside the 74-byte trailing pad after the 142-byte vocoder block. Preserve original value.
